seed_expert_discoveries.project: Open source AGI acceleration via fine-tuning
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Dozens of AI labs fine-tuning on Kimi and GLM models; Deepseek also advancing; Fable-class models expected in 3 months that evade bans.

seed_expert_discoveries.project: Deep Agents for building Claude Code-like agents
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Model-agnostic, general-purpose framework for self-improving agent teams; community guide shows how to replicate Claude Code using LangChain's Deep Agents, especially strong with GLM-5.2.
Need to solve updating internal world models by 2027 to prevent AI systems from failing.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Open-source tool for local media libraries that automates subtitle extraction, translation, and sidecar generation; integrates with agents for full media pipeline.
near_misses.reason: Mentions agent integration but is primarily a media tool, not core AI technical innovation.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Agent design assumptions must survive changing market conditions.
near_misses.reason: Vague commentary on agents without specific technical details or new frameworks.

notes: Limited high-signal technical posts in the past 24 hours from seed experts; global search yielded mostly unrelated content. Focused on the most relevant AI agent and model advancements.
